name: Risk Management Framework for Information Systems and Organizations
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: Risk Management Framework for Information Systems and Organizations. NIST publication NIST.SP.800-37r2.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the public domain in the United States per Section 105 of the US Copyright Act.

current_extraction.notes: Source PDF marker-extracted to markdown. extract_800_37.py parses the **TASK X-N** body headers into per-task structured CSV/JSON: 47 tasks across 7 RMF phases (Prepare-18, Categorize-3, Select-6, Implement-2, Assess-6, Authorize-5, Monitor-7). Pattern matches both upper-case TASK and Task variants emitted by marker.

notes: Auto-generated bulk metadata. Title/description from marker meta + README. Fields like Wikipedia URL, published date, and category-specific relations were not populated; enrich as needed.
